extends.description: Enterprise Button — adds an `enterprise` variant, a `loading` state, and stricter accessibility guidelines on top of the core Button. Inherits anatomy, states, and base API.

modifications.description: New high-emphasis variant for enterprise contexts that uses brand-on-dark colors and an outlined focus ring.
Adds a `loading` state that swaps the label for a spinner while preserving button width.
Tightens the minimum touch-target guideline from 40px to 44px to align with WCAG 2.2 AA.
Inherits the `variant` prop from the core Button. The new `enterprise` value extends the core enum.
